videos.title: HTML Text Formatting - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Learn about HTML text formatting elements including strong, em, mark, small, del, ins, sub, and sup with practical examples.

videos.title: Semantic HTML: Why Strong and Em Matter
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the importance of using semantic text formatting elements like strong and em instead of presentational b and i.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Text Formatting
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers HTML text formatting elements including bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, and more.

videos.title: HTML Code, KBD, SAMP, and VAR Elements
videos.description: Learn how to use technical HTML elements for marking up code, keyboard input, sample output, and variables.

videos.title: HTML Quotations and Citations Tutorial
videos.description: A guide to HTML quotation and citation elements including q, blockquote, cite, abbr, and dfn elements.
